win_condition: First player to 30 VP wins immediately, unless a Dominance card victory is achieved instead.
tiebreaker: Not applicable under standard VP win (first to 30 ends game). If simultaneous effects ever tie, use table consensus/shared victory.

categories.label: Faction VP Gained
categories.description: All VP gained from faction-specific actions and crafting during the game.

categories.label: Dominance Victory Flag
categories.description: Set to 30 if winner achieved a Dominance victory (alternate win condition) to mark non-standard finish.
